entities.name: Dials
entities.context: A set of metrics reflecting different dimensions of V's knowledge system.

entities.name: Archetypes
entities.context: Frameworks used in V's knowledge system.

entities.name: Hooks
entities.context: Attention-grabbing phrases or strategies in V's method.

entities.name: Proof enrichers
entities.context: Resources or tools that enhance the value of V's offering.

entities.name: CTA
entities.context: Call to action for engagement in V's knowledge system.

relationships.context: Both are components of V's knowledge system.
Both serve as functions within V's knowledge framework.
Hooks may lead to the use of proof enrichers in V's system.
Proof enrichers support CTA by providing reassurance.
